title: Assessment of patient-derived tumour xenografts (PDXs) as a discovery tool for cancer epigenomics.
author: Guilhamon P Butcher LM Presneau N Wilson GA Feber A Paul DS Schutte M Haybaeck J Keilholz U Hoffman J Ross MT Flanagan AM Beck S
content:
S-EPMC4292812 PMC4292812 Assessment of patient-derived tumour xenografts (PDXs) as a discovery tool for cancer epigenomics.

Background

The use of tumour xenografts is a well-established research tool in cancer genomics but has not yet been comprehensively evaluated for cancer epigenomics
